query:
ALTER TABLE users
  ADD COLUMN auth_provider VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'manus',
  ADD COLUMN linkedin_id VARCHAR(100) NULL UNIQUE,
  ADD COLUMN google_id VARCHAR(100) NULL UNIQUE,
  ADD COLUMN linkedin_profile_url VARCHAR(500) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN linkedin_headline VARCHAR(300) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN linkedin_industry VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN linkedin_location VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_phone VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_birthday DATE NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_gender VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_address_json JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_organizations_json JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN employer_name VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN job_title VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN profile_enriched_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN profile_enrichment_source VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN sign_in_data_json JSON NULL;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS auth_provider_tokens (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  provider ENUM('linkedin','google') NOT NULL,
  access_token_encrypted TEXT NOT NULL,
  refresh_token_encrypted TEXT NULL,
  token_expires_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  scopes_granted JSON NOT NULL,
  last_profile_fetch_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_provider (user_id, provider)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS auth_enrichment_log (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  provider ENUM('linkedin','google','email','apollo','pdl','manus') NOT NULL,
  event_type ENUM('initial_signup','re_auth','token_refresh','manual_enrich','periodic_refresh') NOT NULL,
  fields_captured JSON NOT NULL,
  fields_new JSON NOT NULL,
  fields_updated JSON NOT NULL,
  raw_response_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  suitability_dimensions_updated JSON NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
